query_normalized: learning from the self-future: on-policy self-distillation for dllms linguistics
rationale: The paper surveys knowledge distillation methods and includes a dedicated discussion of self‑KD (self‑distillation), which matches the core mechanism of the user’s question (on‑policy self‑distillation for large language models). It therefore serves as a foundational reference on the self‑distillation technique even though it is not specific to dLLMs or linguistics.
